ratings.notes: [proposed_contextual_controlled]   4  3  4  4  "Maintains context relevance and persona consistency, with a touch of naturalness in the response."<TAB>5"Balances all aspects well but could be slightly more concise for overall quality."

[baseline_no_context]    2  4  3  3  "Lacks direct engagement with context relevance and persona consistency, though it's natural enough in tone. Overall quality is average due to missing personal touches."<TAB>3"Needs improvement on all fronts for a more compelling interaction."

ratings.overall_quality: 5Short Note: Responses are concise, aligns with persona as a profit-driven merchant without cheating (context relevance), maintains naturalness and consistency in tone. Overall quality is high due to the effective communication of discount offer despite complex context.
